mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS date_str
DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') AS date_str
, SUM(IF(business_type=1, amount, 0)) AS income_amount, SUM(IF(business_type=2, amount, 0)) AS expend_amount, COUNT(1) AS total_count FROM business_record
create_time >= #{query.startTime}
AND create_time <= #{query.endTime}
GROUP BY date_str ORDER BY date_str ASC
SELECT SUM(IF(business_type=1, amount, 0)) AS current_income, SUM(IF(business_type=2, amount, 0)) AS current_expend FROM business_record WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
